SRC-001.notes: Google API reference guide — core source for method/parameter/deprecation documentation patterns. Directly applicable to the 10+ new public API types.

SRC-002.notes: Diátaxis framework — essential for tutorial/how-to/reference structural distinctions. One title recommendation (How to prefix) blocked by INV-style-003, but core principles align well with Kentico invariants.

SRC-003.notes: Microsoft Writing Style Guide — step-by-step and reference documentation patterns. Navigation notation blocked (> vs ->) by INV-style-046, but procedure structure and code example guidance fully compatible.

SRC-004.notes: Write the Docs guide not fetched — curated higher-priority sources (Google, Diátaxis, Microsoft) covered all needed topics within the 8-fetch budget.
